modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Restore deleted section on SharePoint home page with permissions.

full_description_text:  
I need help with a section that was deleted from the left side of the home page in SharePoint. It was important for navigation and now it’s missing. Can you please add it back with the same permissions as before? I'm not sure how to do this myself.
short_description: Restore deleted section on SharePoint home page with permissions.
description: I need help with a section that was deleted from the left side of the home page in SharePoint. It was important for navigation and now it’s missing. Can you please add it back with the same permissions as before? I'm not sure how to do this myself.
